codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves both prior blocking flake.nix problems: the Go source filter now preserves directory nodes for buildGoModule, and the frontend package no longer tries to run pnpm inside a sandboxed Nix build. I found one non-blocking follow-up in the updated shared-state note.

issues.description: The overview bullet still says the frontend uses `stdenv.mkDerivation`, but the detailed section and flake now use `pkgs.runCommand`. This documentation inconsistency could mislead future workers even though the code fix itself is correct.

summary: Pass. Reviewing the original nixos-config failure together with the fix shows that `flake.nix` line 22 now keeps directories in the Go source filter and line 35 replaces the sandbox-blocked pnpm derivation with a `runCommand` placeholder, so both prior blocking issues are addressed. The only remaining issue is a non-blocking stale sentence in `.factory/library/nixos-config.md`.
